name: Branch (Conditional)
description: Evaluates a condition against the input. Downstream edges connected to the `true` output fire when the condition is truthy; edges on `false` fire when falsy.

condition.description: A simple comparison expression, e.g. `input.value > 10` or `input.status == "ok"`. Supports ==, !=, >, >=, <, <=, and truthiness of `input`.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Bound as `input` inside the condition expression.

outputs.name: true
outputs.description: Equal to `data` when the condition is truthy; otherwise undefined (edges on this output do not fire).

outputs.name: false
outputs.description: Equal to `data` when the condition is falsy; otherwise undefined.
